summary: Wire document-scoped bounded AI conversation persistence into the panel with startup hydration, fail-safe local storage, and an explicit clear action.

decisions.decision: Use a document-scoped local-storage adapter with guarded get/set/remove operations and keep the panel fail-safe when storage is unavailable; the strict bounded serializer remains the only persisted format.
decisions.rationale: The current desktop webview and web target both expose local storage, while guarding every operation preserves editing if quotas or privacy modes reject persistence.

decisions.decision: Expose an explicit Clear conversation action that removes the document key and dispatches the reducer clear action in the same event.
decisions.rationale: FR-10.6 requires deletable per-project conversations; a single visible action prevents stale persisted context from surviving user intent.

testEvidence.criterion: Conversation hydration, bounded persistence, and deletion remain safe.
testEvidence.test: Run focused panel and persistence tests once, then lint/source policy once.

red.outcome: RED: no pre-change red test was required for the adapter-only integration; the new document-key/deletion test was written before implementation.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/application/ai/conversation-persistence.test.ts; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: 2 files and 7 tests passed; lint and source policy passed.

questions: Provider-secret hydration for redaction, project-export conversation policy, and hosted AC-10.d evidence remain pending; no claim is made that local storage is the final desktop keychain-backed persistence mechanism.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
